title: Rebuild Version 9 with CETA Galaxy logo from Version 16

requirements.text: Restore the full frontend application to the Version 9 state, preserving all its layouts, sections, content, styling, and functionality exactly as they were in that version.
acceptanceCriteria: All page sections (Navigation, Hero, About, VisionPillars, Reunion, Survey, StakeholderVoices, DigitalImpact, Footer) match Version 9 exactly
All Version 9 styling, animations, and content are intact

requirements.text: Replace the CETA Galaxy logo used in Version 9 with the CETA Galaxy logo asset from Version 16. Update all references to the CETA Galaxy logo in Navigation.tsx, HeroSection.tsx, and Footer.tsx to use the Version 16 logo file.

quotes: keep the CETA logo from Version 16

acceptanceCriteria: The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the Navigation bar matches the Version 16 logo asset
The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the HeroSection matches the Version 16 logo asset
The CETA Galaxy logo displayed in the Footer matches the Version 16 logo asset
The HOPE logo remains unchanged from Version 9

constraints: Do not change any backend logic or data models
Do not modify the HOPE logo — only the CETA Galaxy logo should be swapped
All other Version 9 content, layout, and functionality must remain exactly as-is
nonGoals: Introducing any new features or sections beyond what existed in Version 9
Changing the HOPE logo or any other brand assets
Modifying backend subscription or profile management logic
